product_overview: A personal data vault that lets users upload documents, organize them with AI into clusters and markdown summaries, and query their private data via an AI chat with transparent sources.
core_goals: Store important personal files in one private place
Automatically group related files and surface which are most important
Generate per-file Markdown summaries to make documents reusable for AI
Let users ask questions about their own data and see which files the AI used

features.name: File Upload
features.description: Add multiple documents (PDF, TXT, MD, DOCX) to the personal data space using drag-and-drop or file selection and observe upload progress.
user_flows: Navigate to /#my-data -> Add multiple files (PDF, TXT, MD, DOCX) to upload -> Confirm upload begins -> See upload progress notification -> See uploaded files appear in file list with initial processing status
Navigate to /#my-data -> Attempt to add an unsupported file type -> See validation error preventing the upload

features.name: File List View
features.description: Browse all uploaded files with filename, type, upload time, extracted text length and processing status; remove files when needed.
user_flows: Navigate to /#my-data -> See list of uploaded files with filename, type, uploaded time, text length and processing status badges -> Remove a file from the list -> Observe the file is no longer listed and storage stats update
Navigate to /#my-data -> Observe a file's processing status transition to organized or ready after processing completes

features.name: AI Organization
features.description: Manually trigger AI-driven organization to group files into clusters, score importance, and generate per-file Markdown summaries.
user_flows: Navigate to /#my-data -> Trigger AI organization for stored files -> See a loading spinner while organization runs -> See a completion notification when organization finishes -> Navigate to /#organized to review resulting clusters
Navigate to /#my-data with no uploaded files -> Trigger AI organization -> See a warning that there are no files to organize

features.name: Collections View
features.description: Browse organized clusters showing cluster titles, summaries, member counts, importance labels, and primary file indicators.
user_flows: Navigate to /#organized -> View cluster cards with title and summary, file count, importance labels and primary file indicators -> Open a file from a cluster to view its detailed summary
Navigate to /#organized when no clusters exist -> See an empty state guiding the user to upload files and run AI organization

features.name: File Summary Panel
features.description: Inspect a file's Markdown summary that includes key topics, key facts, importance score/label, primary candidate flag, and suggested usage.
user_flows: Navigate to /#organized -> Open a file summary -> Read the markdown summary including key topics, key facts, importance score and suggested usage -> Close the summary panel (press Escape or use close action) -> Return to collections view
Navigate to /#organized -> Open a file whose summary is not yet generated -> See a placeholder or message indicating the summary is pending

features.name: AI Chat with Retrieval
features.description: Ask questions about uploaded data; the system retrieves relevant cluster/files and returns AI answers with inline source references and a sources panel showing retrieval mode and reasoning.
user_flows: Navigate to /#ai-chat -> Type a question in the chat input -> Submit the question -> See an AI response with inline source references in the answer -> Open the sources panel to review selected cluster, files used, retrieval mode and reasoning
Navigate to /#ai-chat -> Try to submit an empty question -> See a validation prompt asking to enter a question
Navigate to /#ai-chat -> Select a suggested question chip -> Submit the suggested question -> See an AI response with inline source references

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Switch between main app pages (My Data, Collections, AI Chat) via the sidebar and view storage statistics and active nav state.
user_flows: From any page, navigate to /#my-data -> Observe the sidebar shows My Data as active and view storage stats in the sidebar footer -> Navigate to /#organized -> Observe the sidebar updates the active state to Collections -> Navigate to /#ai-chat -> Observe the AI Chat page and that storage stats remain visible

routes.description: Main page - My Data view with file upload, file list, and navigation sidebar
My Data page - Upload files and view file list with processing status
Collections page - View organized file clusters with importance scores and summaries
AI Chat page - Ask questions using personal data with source transparency

features.name: File Upload
features.description: Upload multiple files (PDF, TXT, MD, DOCX) to personal data space with drag-and-drop support
user_interactions: Click upload button or drag files to drop zone
Select files from file picker (PDF, TXT, MD, DOCX)
See upload progress toast notification
View uploaded files in file list with processing status

features.name: File List View
features.description: View all uploaded files with metadata, processing status, and delete capability
user_interactions: View list of uploaded files with filename, type, date, and text length
See processing status badge (uploaded, processing, organized, ready, error)
Click delete button to remove a file

features.name: AI Organization
features.description: Organize files into clusters using AI, score importance, and generate markdown summaries
user_interactions: Click "จัดระเบียบด้วย AI" (Organize with AI) button
See loading spinner during organization
View toast notification when organization completes

features.name: Collections View
features.description: Browse organized file clusters with cluster titles, summaries, file importance badges, and primary file indicators
user_interactions: Click Collections nav item in sidebar
View cluster cards with title and summary
See file count, importance labels (high/medium/low), and primary file badges
Click on a file within cluster to view its summary

features.name: File Summary Panel
features.description: View detailed markdown summary of a file including key topics, key facts, importance score, and suggested usage
user_interactions: Click on a file in cluster view to open summary panel
View summary text, key topics, key facts, importance details
Click close button or press Escape to close panel

features.name: AI Chat with Retrieval
features.description: Ask questions about uploaded data with AI-powered retrieval showing source files, retrieval modes, and reasoning
user_interactions: Click AI Chat nav item in sidebar
Type a question in chat input textarea
Click send button or press Enter to submit
Click suggestion chips for pre-defined questions
View AI response with inline source references
View sources panel showing selected cluster, files used, retrieval mode, and reasoning

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Sidebar navigation between three main pages with active state indicators and storage stats
user_interactions: Click sidebar nav items to switch pages (My Data, Collections, AI Chat)
View storage stats in sidebar footer (file count, cluster count, processed count)

known_limitations.issue: Single user mode - no authentication or multi-user support
known_limitations.impact: All data belongs to a hardcoded default-user, no login required

known_limitations.issue: Frontend is a single-page app using CSS class toggling, not URL-based routing
known_limitations.impact: Pages are shown/hidden via adding/removing CSS active class, browser URL does not change
User must click organize button after uploading files, not automatic
